text: Developing a mobile app involves several important decisions. First, you must choose between native and cross-platform development. Native apps are built specifically for iOS or Android, offering excellent performance and full access to device features. Cross-platform tools like React Native let you write one codebase for both systems, saving time but sometimes sacrificing performance. Second, responsive design ensures your app looks and works well on different screen sizes. Finally, after development, you submit your app to stores like the Apple App Store or Google Play, where quality and performance are reviewed before public release.
